overall.description: Spider-Man is perched on a skyscraper ledge overlooking a bustling Times Square-like urban intersection in a video game. The scene features bright midday sunlight, heavy traffic flow with numerous vehicles, dense pedestrian crowds below, and towering digital billboards covering the surrounding glass buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: Times Square-style commercial intersection with digital billboards

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man is crouched on a skyscraper ledge, surveying the busy city street below with slight head movements and shifts in posture

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab moving slowly through traffic in the avenue below

entered.detail: tall glass building facade where Spider-Man is perched, featuring reflective windows and concrete ledge
large illuminated digital billboards including a prominent red advertisement screen on the distant building
tall modern skyscraper with glass curtain wall and vertical structural elements
multi-lane city street filled with cars, taxis, and buses moving in both directions
open pedestrian area at the intersection with dense crowds of people walking and gathering
building facade with purple illuminated signage visible on the right side of the street canyon

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man observes the bustling city from a high ledge on a glass skyscraper. Below, a busy multi-lane avenue filled with taxis and cars stretches toward a distant intersection surrounded by massive digital billboards. Dense crowds of pedestrians fill the plaza areas while modern glass towers line both sides of the urban canyon under bright midday sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a high-altitude perspective of a glass skyscraper and expands to reveal the immense scale of a bustling urban intersection. It begins with Spider-Man perched on a high ledge, looking down upon a multi-lane avenue teeming with taxis and cars. As the camera moves, the view opens up to encompass the deep urban canyon, where modern glass towers frame a distant plaza filled with dense crowds of pedestrians. The scene then shifts its focus toward the horizon, where massive digital billboards illuminate the intersection under the glare of the bright midday sun.
